rationale: This pair looks substantively connected: both papers study brand-extension stretch (close/moderate/far or distant), perceived fit, and extension evaluation, and the cited 2008 study offers a mechanism (self-construal/relational processing with motivation) that is directly relevant to the citing paper’s framing of prior determinants. The reference match is an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.45.3.337), indicating this specific prior work is deliberately cited rather than an incidental background list item.
